channel.title: Nubenetes Intelligence Digest
channel.description: AI-curated top picks from the Cloud Native & Kubernetes ecosystem

item.title: docs.anthropic.com: Claude Code CLI
item.description: [CRITICAL] Anthropic's official agentic CLI redefines developer workflows by allowing autonomous agents to execute terminal commands, run tests, and manage Git directly.

item.title: antigravity.google: Google Antigravity Agentic Platform
item.description: [CRITICAL] Bridges the gap between local agent prototypes and production-grade deployments on secure Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) clusters.

item.title: cursor.com: Cursor AI Code Editor
item.description: [CRITICAL] As the leading AI-first IDE, it has shifted the industry paradigm of daily software engineering through multi-file agentic code generation.

item.title: Crossplane
item.description: [CRITICAL] It represents a major paradigm shift, transforming Kubernetes from a container orchestrator into a universal control plane for all cloud infrastructure.

item.title: NVIDIA/k8s-device-plugin: NVIDIA device plugin for Kubernetes
item.description: [CRITICAL] It is the essential hardware-enablement layer allowing Kubernetes to dynamically schedule and manage physical GPUs for demanding AI and ML workloads.

item.title: vLLM on Kubernetes
item.description: [CRITICAL] Standardizes memory-efficient LLM serving via PagedAttention and provides concrete deployment templates for production Kubernetes clusters.

item.title: Tetragon (Cilium)
item.description: [CRITICAL] Provides kernel-level, eBPF-powered security observability and real-time threat enforcement directly within Kubernetes clusters.

item.title: kube-state-metrics 🌟
item.description: [CRITICAL] This indispensable agent translates raw Kubernetes API server states into actionable Prometheus metrics for cluster-wide health tracking.

item.title: buildkit
item.description: [CRITICAL] Docker's next-generation build engine radically accelerates container image creation through concurrent stage execution and advanced caching.

item.title: github.com: Istio
item.description: [CRITICAL] As the dominant enterprise service mesh, Istio defines the standard for secure, high-performance microservices traffic management and observability.

item.title: github: Flux Version 2
item.description: [CRITICAL] A foundational GitOps controller toolkit that provides highly parallel, decoupled resource reconciliation directly inside Kubernetes.

item.title: github.com/prometheus/prometheus
item.description: [CRITICAL] Prometheus remains the absolute cornerstone of cloud-native telemetry and the primary backend for modern SRE observability.

item.title: containerd - An open and reliable container runtime
item.description: [CRITICAL] Following Docker's runtime deprecation, containerd has become the industry-standard, CNCF-graduated core runtime powering Kubernetes clusters globally.

item.title: runc
item.description: [CRITICAL] As the canonical, OCI-compliant low-level runtime engine, runc is the fundamental foundation upon which most modern container ecosystems are built.

item.title: hashicorp/vault
item.description: [CRITICAL] Acts as the industry-standard engine for dynamic secrets management, data protection, and enterprise Zero Trust identity broker.

item.title: OpenTelemetry Collector
item.description: [CRITICAL] The OpenTelemetry Collector is the industry-standard pipeline for vendor-agnostic telemetry collection, processing, and routing.

item.title: kube-prometheus
item.description: [CRITICAL] It serves as the de facto reference architecture and deployment pattern for comprehensive Kubernetes cluster monitoring.

item.title: Kubernetes Gateway API
item.description: [CRITICAL] As the official next-generation routing standard in Kubernetes, it provides highly expressive, role-oriented alternatives to the legacy Ingress API.

item.title: github.com/vmware-tanzu/velero
item.description: [CRITICAL] Velero is the industry-standard tool for backing up, restoring, and migrating Kubernetes cluster resources and persistent volumes.

item.title: Announcing Claude Managed Agents on Cloudflare
item.description: [CRITICAL] Establishes a secure, sandboxed serverless runtime on Cloudflare Workers for orchestrating complex, autonomous AI agent workflows at the edge.
